Professional Summary

Cloud engineer and full-stack developer with an M.S. in Computer Science from Florida Atlantic University (GPA 3.9/4.0, May 2026) and 4 cloud certifications: AWS Certified Developer – Associate, AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner, GCP Associate Cloud Engineer, and Red Hat Certified Developer EX183. Hands-on with AWS Lambda, S3, EC2, DynamoDB, IAM/CloudWatch, and GCP. Deployed three production applications across Vercel, Render, Railway, and Cloudinary with multi-cloud managed database architecture.

Technical Skills
AWS Services:Lambda (serverless), S3 (object storage), EC2 (compute), DynamoDB (NoSQL), IAM (least-privilege), CloudWatch (monitoring)

Deployment:Vercel (frontend CI/CD), Render (backend), Railway (managed DB), Cloudinary (CDN/media), GitHub Actions
Databases:PostgreSQL (managed cloud), MySQL (Railway), DynamoDB; Prisma ORM migrations

Languages:JavaScript, Python, Java, C++

AWS Cloud Virtual Internship | EduSkills (AICTE Approved)
Mar – May 2022
  • Designed and deployed serverless applications using AWS Lambda (event-driven compute), S3 (object storage), and DynamoDB (NoSQL), following cloud-native architecture patterns.
  • Optimized cloud architecture for cost efficiency; implemented IAM policies enforcing least-privilege access across services.
  • Monitored application health and performance using AWS CloudWatch metrics and logging.
RPA – Blue Prism Virtual Internship | EduSkills (AICTE Approved)
Oct – Dec 2021
  • Automated business workflows using Blue Prism, reducing manual processing time by 25%; designed scalable RPA solutions for data-entry and reporting.
Projects – Cloud Architecture & Deployment
Job Tracker SaaS – Multi-Cloud Deployment
2026
Vercel (frontend), Render (backend Node.js), Cloudinary (CDN/file storage), Managed PostgreSQL, Nodemailer
job-tracker-saas.vercel.app · github.com/vamsishesamsetti/job-tracker-saas
  • Architected a multi-cloud deployment: React frontend on Vercel (global CDN, CI/CD from GitHub), Node.js/Express backend on Render, PostgreSQL on managed cloud DB.
  • Integrated Cloudinary for scalable media/file storage (resume upload/preview) — decoupled from application server, zero disk dependency.
  • Configured secure environment variable management across Vercel and Render; zero secrets in version control.
  • Backend features: Prisma ORM migrations, JWT auth, role-based access, rate limiting, email service via Nodemailer.
SmartBid – Cloud-Deployed Secure Auction Platform
2026
Render (backend Flask), Railway (managed MySQL), Python, AES-256, JWT
github.com/vamsishesamsetti/smartbid-auction
  • Deployed Python/Flask backend on Render with Railway-managed MySQL — fully managed cloud database requiring zero self-hosted infrastructure.
  • Backend implements AES-256 encrypted bid storage, JWT authentication, and transactional MySQL to prevent race conditions.
  • Documented full API in Postman collection; Railway provides automated backups and connection pooling.
CricketPulse – Serverless Frontend Deployment
2026
Vercel (global CDN + CI/CD), React (Vite), CricAPI
live-cricket-score-app.vercel.app · github.com/vamsishesamsetti/live-cricket-score-app
  • Deployed on Vercel with secure environment variable configuration (API keys not exposed to client); automatic preview deployments on every PR.
  • Real-time CricAPI integration with retry logic; mobile-first responsive React app with production-grade error handling.
